reforms.description: The Finnish government has initiated the National Health Project aimed at improving the availability of health care, reducing waiting times, and enhancing staff training, with significant funding allocated for its implementation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The project aims to enhance healthcare services, which can lead to improved public health and productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The project has been initiated and is currently in force.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant policy change with substantial funding and a focus on health sector improvement.
reforms.source_quote: The government has recently embarked on a reform of the health system, run by the Ministry of Social Affairs and Health and known as the National Health Project.

reforms.description: A network was established in October 2001 involving all ministries to address biotechnology issues across various sectors including science, innovation, and health.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The network aims to enhance collaboration across sectors, which can foster innovation and improve biotechnology outcomes.
reforms.status_evidence: The network was established and is currently operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of a cross-ministerial network is a significant but narrower reform aimed at addressing specific issues in biotechnology.
reforms.source_quote: In October 2001 a network was established including all ministries with the aim of tackling biotechnology issues in science and innovation but also industry, environment, agriculture and forestry, health and trade policies.
